title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 355.106 - Liability for preincorporation actions
text:
355.106.  Liability for preincorporation actions. — All persons purporting to act as or on behalf of a corporation, knowing there was no incorporation under this chapter, are jointly and severally liable for all liabilities created while so acting.
(L. 1994 H.B. 1095) 
Effective 7-01-95
